title: prenanthes trifoliolata var. nana
intro: Prenanthes trifoliolata var. nana, also known as dwarf white lettuce or dwarf rattlesnake root, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Prenanthes trifoliolata var. nana include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its roots can be dried and used in herbal remedies.
